LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.description: A smoke grenade launcher mounted on a Paladin LAV. Excellent for providing smoke cover to infantry, this turret has no offensive capabilities.
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: Single
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: Burst
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.label: paladin smoke grenade launcher
